title: Floral Foam Bricks 23x11x8cm - Wet or Dry, Florist Grade - For Stunning Fresh & Artificial Flower Arrangements (Dry Foam, 5)
features: VERSATILE WET & DRY FOAM OPTIONS: Select hydrating wet foam to prolong the life of fresh flowers or durable dry foam for secure artificial arrangements, offering flexibility for all your floral designs.

CONVENIENT PACK SIZES FOR ANY PROJECT: Available in packs of 1 , 2, 5, or 10, or a bulk box of 20, providing the perfect quantity for small crafts, large event displays, and professional florist needs.
Versatile 23x11x8cm FLORIST-GRADE BRICKS: These substantial foam bricks offer ample material for creating large, impactful floral arrangements, ensuring professional results every time.
EFFORTLESS CUSTOMIZATION WITH EASY CUTTING & SHAPING: Adapt these foam bricks to any container with ease, allowing for precise design execution and perfect fits for any vessel.
MAXIMIZE FRESH FLOWER LONGEVITY WITH SUPERIOR HYDRATION (WET): The high-quality wet foam ensures optimal water retention, keeping fresh blooms vibrant and extending their lifespan, minimizing waste.

PROVIDE UNWAVERING SUPPORT FOR ARTIFICIAL DISPLAYS (DRY): The dense dry foam offers a stable and secure base for intricate artificial flower designs, maintaining their form and visual impact throughout any event.
description: "Create stunning, professional-grade floral arrangements with our versatile floral foam bricks. Available in both wet and dry options, and in convenient pack sizes of 2, 5, 10, or a bulk box of 20, these large 23x11x8cm bricks provide the perfect foundation for all your floral design needs. Wet Floral Foam: Ideal for fresh flower arrangements. Provides superior hydration, extending the life of cut flowers. Easy to soak and use. Dry Floral Foam: Perfect for artificial, silk, and dried flower arrangements. Provides a stable and secure base. Easy to cut and shape. Key Features: Dimensions: 23cm x 11cm x 8cm Available in wet or dry options. Pack sizes: 1, 2, 5, 10, or 20 (box) Florist-grade quality. Versatile for all floral designs. Perfect for weddings, events, funerals, and home decor. Whether you are a professional florist or a passionate DIY enthusiast, our floral foam bricks offer the quality and versatility you need to create breathtaking floral displays. Choose the correct version of floral foam depending on the desired effect, and select the perfect pack size for your project."
